message:
Expand test coverage: fcp-bootstrap (+75), fcp-sandbox (+30), fcp-tailscale (+40)

fcp-bootstrap: workflow.rs 17→53 tests (mode Clone/Debug, config builder,
state transitions), genesis.rs 18→57 tests (validation edge cases, CBOR
roundtrips, zone ordering, keypair sign, error Display).

fcp-sandbox/egress.rs: 133→163 tests covering IDN punycode encoding,
IPv6 literal CIDR checks, wildcard SSRF prevention, credential injector
edge cases, serde for DenyReason/EgressHttpRequest.

fcp-tailscale: identity.rs 35→54 tests (Unicode/long NodeId, IPv6-only
mesh identity, attestation tag tampering, serde with attestation),
client.rs 44→65 tests (mock client operations, multi-peer JSON parsing,
status/peer serde, Clone/Debug traits).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
